ques: Show the electrical resistivity of UNS A92024 and UNS G10800 at 20 degrees Celsius.
answer: At 20 °C, UNS A92024 (aluminum alloy 2024) has an electrical resistivity of 4.9×10⁻⁶ Ω·cm (≈4.865 μΩ·cm = 4.865×10⁻⁸ Ω·m), while UNS G10800 (1080 carbon steel) has an electrical resistivity of 1.8×10⁻⁵ Ω·cm (≈18 μΩ·cm = 1.8×10⁻⁷ Ω·m).
